ふんふんふ～～ん♪ レイゼリア様に褒められちゃったぁ～～♪<br>わたくしのこと:
Hmm-hmm-hmmm! Lady Reyzeria praised me!♪
She said she relies on me—Ehe! Ehehehehe!♪
――はっ！ し、司令官！？ いつからそこに！？ <br>ま、まま、まさか、ずっと:
—*gasp*! C-Commander! Since when have you been there?
N-no, no way, you were watching the whole time...!
ぐぅ～！ あんなに燥いでいるところを、他でもないあなたに見られるなんて！<br>:
Ugh! Of all people, you had to see me so giddy! You're going to mock
me, aren't you? I'll kill you, then myself!
え？ バカにしてない……？ 慕っている人に褒められて喜ぶのは当然だし、<br>い:
Huh? You're not making fun of me...? It's natural to be happy when
praised by your idol, and since I work hard, her praise is natural...?
んぅ……急になによ……べ、別に、あなたにそんなこと言われても、<br>嬉しくない:

you said that... Idiot...
